prompt_text:
### Demographics: 47-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating); Recurrent UTIs over the last 6 months with dysuria/frequency.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 67.3 kg; Height 151.8 cm; BMI 29.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 9.4%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 209mg/dL; 9 months ago 245mg/dL; 6 months ago 220mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.9kg; 9 months ago 67.7kg; 6 months ago 65.1kg; 3 months ago 64.9kg; current 67.3kg), Height (12 months ago 151.8cm; 9 months ago 151.8cm; 6 months ago 151.8cm; 3 months ago 151.8cm; current 151.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 29.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 90mmHg; 9 months ago 90mmHg; 6 months ago 87mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 116U/L; 9 months ago 108U/L; 6 months ago 115U/L; 3 months ago 107U/L; current 115U/L), AST (12 months ago 48U/L; 9 months ago 49U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 46U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 33mg/g; 9 months ago 34mg/g; 6 months ago 39mg/g; 3 months ago 54mg/g; current 33mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 69mg/dL; 3 months ago 68mg/dL; current 70mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 145mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 143mg/dL; 3 months ago 125mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
